title: Visor Theme
description: Schema for .visor.yaml theme files — portable visual identity definitions for the Visor design system.

group.description: Theme group for the docs site theme switcher (e.g. 'Visor', 'Client', 'Low Orbit'). Used by `visor theme sync`. Defaults to folder-based grouping when omitted.

colors.description: Color definitions for light mode. Only primary is required — all others have sensible defaults.

primary.description: Brand color. Drives interactive-*, accent-*, text-link, border-focus tokens. Anchored at shade 600.

accent.description: Secondary brand color. Defaults to primary if omitted.

neutral.description: Base neutral color for generating the gray scale (50-950). Defaults to Tailwind Gray if omitted.

background.description: Page background for light mode. Default: #FFFFFF.

surface.description: Card/panel background for light mode. Default: #FFFFFF.

colors-dark.description: Dark mode color overrides. Any key from colors can be overridden. Omitted keys inherit from the derived dark mode values (not from light mode).

typography.description: Typography configuration. Defaults to system font stacks if omitted.

family.description: Google Fonts family name or CSS font stack.

source.description: Font source. Defaults to Google Fonts lookup, then local.

org.description: Organization namespace for visor-fonts CDN (required when source is visor-fonts).

display.description: Display/decorative font for hero text and splash screens. Falls back to heading font if omitted.

family.description: Google Fonts family name or CSS font stack.

weight.description: Font weight for display text. Default: 400.

source.description: Font source. Defaults to Google Fonts lookup, then local.

org.description: Organization namespace for visor-fonts CDN (required when source is visor-fonts).

family.description: Google Fonts family name or CSS font stack.

weight.description: Font weight for body text. Default: 400.

source.description: Font source. Defaults to Google Fonts lookup, then local.

org.description: Organization namespace for visor-fonts CDN (required when source is visor-fonts).

family.description: Google Fonts family name or CSS font stack for monospace.

scale.description: Type scale multiplier applied to the font-size ramp. Default: 1.

slots.description: Per-slot overrides for the generated Flutter Material TextTheme. Any subset of the 16 slots may be specified; omitted slots fall through to the Material 3 2024 defaults shipped in visor_core.

base.description: Base spacing unit in pixels. Default: 4. Generates the full spacing scale.

shadows.description: Named shadow definitions as CSS box-shadow values.

strokeWidths.description: Stroke-width scale in pixels — used for borders, outlines, dividers, progress-indicator strokes. Defaults: thin=1, regular=1.5, medium=2, thick=2.5.

duration-normal.description: Normal duration for standard transitions. Default: 200ms.

duration-slow.description: Slow duration for larger animations. Default: 500ms.

easing.description: Default easing curve as a CSS timing function.

overrides.description: Per-token escape hatch. Values replace derived tokens. Use CSS custom property names without the -- prefix as keys.

light.description: Token overrides applied in light mode.

dark.description: Token overrides applied in dark mode.

migrate.description: Migration metadata consumed by `visor migrate` commands. Does not affect CSS generation or theme application.

token-substitution.description: §3.1 V7-primitive → Visor-semantic substitution table. Maps V7 CSS custom property names (with -- prefix) to Visor semantic token names. Consumed by `visor migrate token-substitution`.

cssColor.description: CSS color value. Accepts hex (#RGB, #RRGGBB, #RRGGBBAA), rgb()/rgba(), hsl()/hsla(), or oklch() formats.

textSlotOverride.description: Per-slot override for one Material TextTheme entry.

size.description: Font size in logical pixels (Flutter TextStyle.fontSize).

letter-spacing.description: Letter spacing in logical pixels (Flutter TextStyle.letterSpacing). Material defaults include negative values, e.g. -0.25 for displayLarge.
